
::: {.wideblock}
```sql
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION get_monthly_sales(product_id BIGINT, year BIGINT)
RETURNS TABLE (month BIGINT, total_sales BIGINT)
AS $$
DECLARE
  n_month INT;
BEGIN
  FOR n_month IN 1..12 LOOP
    month := n_month;

    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(quantity * unit_sale_price), 0)
    INTO total_sales
    FROM go_daily_sales
    WHERE product_number = product_id 
      AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date) = year
      AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM date) = n_month;

    RETURN NEXT;
  END LOOP;
END;
$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
```
:::

| month | total sales |
|:-----:|:-----------:|
|     1 |     753,929 |
|     2 |     602,276 |
|     3 |     502,065 |
|     4 |     535,228 |
|     5 |      64,881 |
|     6 |     627,853 |
|     7 |     320,140 |
|     8 |     495,635 |
|     9 |     638,835 |
|    10 |     711,212 |
|    11 |   1,155,028 |
|    12 |     562,755 |

: Result of `get_monthly_sales(109110, 2016)` {.striped .hover}
